text.title: trend-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trend-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Entering a trend at peak (mainstream) when competition is already intense
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Late mainstream entry requires a cost or distribution moat that most new entrants lack; the window for margin capture has closed.

failure-mode.description: Chasing every trend without a personal-fit filter
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trend strength without execution ability produces a business in a growing market that the founder cannot competitively serve.

failure-mode.description: No counter-signals in the trend report
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A trend report without cooling indicators is a marketing document, not an analysis. At least 3 counter-signals are mandatory in every final report.

failure-mode.description: Agent cites a 2022 Gartner Hype Cycle as "this year's report"
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without WebFetch, the agent uses training-data reports as if they are current. Always check report_publish_date against current_date; reject reports older than 18 months for stage timing claims.

failure-mode.description: Agent fabricates CAGR percentages with two decimal places
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Treat any CAGR more precise than the nearest 5% as fabricated unless it has a source URL and page number. Real analyst reports round to one decimal.

failure-mode.description: Agent sums incompatible TAMs (AI software, AI services, AI hardware) without noting double-counting
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require segment definitions to be quoted verbatim from each source before any summing; different reports use different definitional boundaries for "AI market."

failure-mode.description: Agent defaults to US sources and misses EU regulatory pipeline leading indicators
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a jurisdictions list in the orchestrator prompt; EU rules often precede US equivalents by 2-4 years and are the actual market-structure driver.

failure-mode.description: Agent extrapolates a 2-point trend ("usage-based went 20% to 38%") as a forward projection
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Two data points are insufficient for any projection; require at least 8 quarters of data before publishing a trend line and labeling it as directional.
